antipattern.symptom: Team adopts Scrum because the previous team did; failure cost is high; team feels constant escalation.
antipattern.fix: Run 6-dimension score; if predictive home-ground signals win, choose hybrid with predictive tilt.

antipattern.symptom: Hybrid means 'we do Scrum but also a Gantt chart'; nobody knows when to follow which.
antipattern.fix: Schema requires named_hybrid_tilt with explicit boundaries.

antipattern.symptom: Mode chosen at kickoff; never revisited; team suffers in silence.
Decision record says 'we picked agile' with no rationale.
